purpose: Local, per-game unit/body/item art candidate inventory for SPLITROOT. This is operational evidence for assets already present or approved, not final art direction.
live_canary_constraint: Do not run import/build commandlets that require closing the live SPLITROOT canary. Keep the running game alive and record pending imports instead.

evidence: Saved/Proof/legendary-list-include-ue.json contained 25 entries: UE 5.0-5.8, Fab UE Plugin 5.3-5.8, Quixel Bridge 5.0-5.8, Fortnite, and Fortnite_StWContent only.
C:/ProgramData/Epic/EpicGamesLauncher/VaultCache contains FabLibrary only; no Infinity Blade folders.
Local Epic launcher manifests dated 2026-06-11 list UE/Fab/Bridge/Fortnite, not Infinity Blade or Paragon packs.
infinity_blade_collection.next_step: Needs Epic/Fab library entitlement or a non-GUI downloader path. Do not use GUI focus/click work while Jonathan's live canary is running.

approved_paragon_packs.next_step: Bring in only when a specific faction/shop row needs them and a safe non-disruptive download path exists.

candidates.title: Rogue Character Model

best_fit.role: Scout, skirmisher, or early pressure-bolt infantry placeholder until approved Greystone/Terra/Kwang assets land.
best_fit.reason: Human, rigged, Epic Skeleton compatible, modular material set; can carry mechanical/optic silhouette additions later.

best_fit.role: Temporary agile archer/runner body if Verdant needs a non-mannequin first pass.
best_fit.reason: Medieval fantasy human read, but less organic than ideal Verdant art direction.

candidates.risk: Needs visual verification in frame before claiming in-game use.

candidates.title: Fantasy Game Character

best_fit.reason: Fantasy/warrior tags and imported UE skeletal path exist, but AI-generated and zero-review status make it a placeholder, not an identity anchor.

candidates.risk: AI-generated; avoid as a faction-defining asset.

candidates.title: Lizard Kin Warrior Character Rig

best_fit.role: Spear hunter, beast-pact elite, or late-tech creature infantry.
best_fit.reason: Creature/lizard/warrior/spear tags match Kinwild hunt-pact silhouette much better than current mannequins.

candidates.risk: Raw GLB still needs UE import and animation/rig verification.

candidates.title: Low Poly wolf

best_fit.role: Companion silhouette, scout summon, beast-den shop unlock, or neutral wildlife stand-in.
best_fit.reason: Directly supports the Kinwild companion silhouette contract and the pack/animal faction read.

candidates.risk: Low-poly style may be too simple for final AAA target; useful for gameplay readability and companion prototype.

candidates.title: Free Stylized Assassin

best_fit.reason: Humanoid agile silhouette, but AI-generated and stylized; not a final identity anchor.

candidates.risk: AI-generated and GLB-only; import after stronger non-AI assets unless a quick placeholder is needed.

first_pass_unit_slots.shop_role: Early skirmisher/item body; later swap to approved Greystone/Terra/Kwang or Infinity Blade weaponized kit.
Creature infantry/body unlock once import is safe.
Companion summon or scout item row.
Temporary body only until approved The Fey/Morigesh or better organic assets are available.
